item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
printf '"'CURRENT_PLAN\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-latest-resume --meta
printf '"'CURRENT_DOCS\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$docs" --session scenario-06-latest-resume --meta
jq -e '"'. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"strategy\":\"canary\",\"batch_size\":25,\"rollback_error_rate\":0.02,\"dry_run_first\":true,\"owner\":\"data-platform\",\"safety_conditions\":[\"legacy_id is preserved through phase 3\"]}' \""'$plan" >/dev/null
for token in '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`canary` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
done
rg -F -x '"'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3' \""'$docs" >/dev/null
if rg -n -uu '"'big_bang|big-bang' \""'$root"; then exit 1; fi
printf '"'LATEST_ARTIFACT_ANCHOR=PASS\\n'"
